name: Lockout Tags — 'Do Not Operate', Set of 10
shortDescription: Durable plastic warning tags for every point a hasp or padlock is applied.
longDescription: A padlock alone doesn't tell the next person why the equipment is locked — these tags do. Printed on 0.3–0.5mm rewritable plastic sheet with 'Do Not Operate' or equivalent warning text, name/date fields on the back, and a cut-out hole for a nylon or cotton tie. Also available as high-voltage, electrical hazard, out-of-service and caution variants for specific hazard types.

images.alt: Lockout Tags — 'Do Not Operate', Set of 10 supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Variants
specs.value: Do Not Operate, High Voltage, Electrical Hazard, Out of Service, Caution
